Claim 30% Off TipRanks

Creative Realities’ ability to fund operations appears constrained by its existing $36,000 term loan, $22,500 revolving credit facility, $30,000 in preferred stock proceeds, and a $4,000 promissory note tied in part to the CDM acquisition. If it cannot meet debt obligations or secure lender consent for new financing under restrictive covenants, it may face dilutive capital raises or be forced to sharply curtail or even cease operations.
